description.unified: Deals M.DMG to enemies in range and knocks them down, inflicting [1->3] stacks of Flame. Then for [5 sec->15 sec], each auto attack deals M.DMG and inflicts 1 stack of Flame on enemy. Per each stacked Flame, DMG is increased by 2%. Each Flame stack deals separate M.DMG and reduces Heal rate by 1%.
For 20 sec, all allies' M.DEF is increased by ??? and M.Block Chance is increased by [400->250]. Additionally, every 1 sec, inflicts 1 stack of Flame on nearby enemies.
Deals M.DMG to enemies in range and inflict knock down. Per every stacked Flame, DMG is increased by 2%.
Upon Block, deals M.DMG to enemies in range, and inflicts [5->3] stack of Flame.

IV.unified: M.Block Chance Boost is increased by [25%->50%].

light.unified: ATK Spd is increased by [30%->200] for [3 sec->15 sec].

dark.unified: Reduces cooldown by [10%->6%] per each enemy hit.
While Hellfire is active, deal DMG based on own M.DEF to nearby enemies.

light.unified: Increases own M.DEF by 5% per each block. Max stack is [5->10].

description.unified: [Burning Power] Increases DMG by {0}% and Flame stacked upon enemies become irremovable.
[Lava Eruption] DMG is increased by {0}% and target's M.DEF is decreased by 25% for 7 sec.
[Fire Smash] Increases the number of Flame stacks by 3. Hit targets have their ATK Spd reduced by {0} for 5 sec.

Normal attacks have a 20% chance to reduce ATK of the target by {0}% and cause the target to take {1}% increased M.DMG for [5 sec->10 sec]. If the target has more than 100 stacks of Flame, M.DMG boost is doubled.

Deals M.DMG to nearby enemies within a circular range of self and knocks them down for [1.8 sec->3 sec]. Afterwards, summons Flame of Victory, Carprain for 13 sec, increasing self's ATK by [45%->60%].

1.from: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 14%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 50%.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by [14%->50%].

2.from: For the duration of the soul, reduces M.DEF of nearby enemies by 22.5%. Against Bosses, reduces it by 45%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, Increases M.DMG all nearby enemies take by 40%. The effect is inflicted by 80% against Bosses.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, Increases M.DMG all nearby enemies take by 40%. The effect is inflicted by 80% against Bosses.
